title: VIVANCO TVA 2020 Indoor TV Aerial

crossSellProducts.title: SANDSTROM Black Series S1HDM115 High Speed HDMI Cable with Ethernet - 1 m

offers: Get up to 2 months of Apple Music, Apple Fitness+ and Apple Arcade with this product.

OVERVIEW.Suitable for: Digital, Analogue, Radio, HDTV, DVB-T, DVB-T2, DAB, DAB+
OVERVIEW.Dimensions: 330 x 75 x 45 mm (H x W x D)
OVERVIEW.Box contents: Vivanco TVA 2020 Indoor TV Aerial, Aerial cable - 1.2 m

description.main: Improve your TV or radio signal with the Vivanco TVA 2020 Indoor TV Aerial. Optimised for both analogue and digital TV reception with omni-directional design that receives signals from anywhere you place it.
goodToKnow: Omni-directional design receives signals from any position
Reaches signals up to 5 kilometres away
Optimised for analogue and digital TV reception
